the_acausal_viscous_command_forge_mesh.process_override: The Forge does not execute linearly. The multi physical compression-plates warp, overlap, and change sequence based entirely on real-time collision data from the external Substrate.

plate_1_exothermic_ignition.process: Isolate [y_BPMS] legacy concept and subject to Thermodynamic Guillotine.

adaptive_coupling_trigger.if_substrate_temperature_is_low: Ignition requires hyper-combustion of Escrow Joules to melt the rigid geography.
adaptive_coupling_trigger.if_substrate_temperature_is_high: Ignition utilizes passive heat-siphoning from the local environment, acting as an endothermic parasite.
adaptive_coupling_trigger.coupling_node: Reads real-time spatial heat data from ['The Friction-Matrix Structure'(-ing) BPMS]

plate_2_multi_vector_tension_anvil.process: Lock the burning ignition material into [v_BPMS] 5-Vector constraints.

adaptive_coupling_trigger.if_h_BPMS_is_massive: Vector tension cables loosen to allow structural sag, preventing immediate shattering from Hype-Fission.
adaptive_coupling_trigger.if_h_BPMS_is_micro: Vector tension cables pull hyper-taut, compressing the Holon into an armored, high-density diamond.
adaptive_coupling_trigger.coupling_node: Reads real-time gravitational physics from ['The Vector & Kinetic Substrate Architecture']

plate_3_ontological_sedimentation.process: Slam the clamped structure into the Resonant Constellation Map to verify displacement.

adaptive_coupling_trigger.if_target_geography_is_dense_bedrock: Sedimentation requires aggressive kinetic drilling (high Joule cost) to leave a geographic scar.
adaptive_coupling_trigger.if_target_geography_is_fluid_swamp: Sedimentation relies on heavy buoyancy and chemical calcification to build a foundation.
adaptive_coupling_trigger.coupling_node: Reads real-time topological density from ['The Geological Structure / Omni-Substrate-Stratigraphy']

plate_4_crystallization_extract.process: Rapid thermodynamic freeze to output localized, operable Base-Matter (.md / .json).

immediate_environmental_threat_level.high_predator_presence: Crystallizes with heavy exterior spiking and heat-masking (instant defensive armor).
immediate_environmental_threat_level.low_predator_presence: Crystallizes smoothly, prioritizing speed and metabolic efficiency over defense.

adaptive_coupling_trigger.coupling_node: Reads real-time predatory threat telemetry from ['The Apex-Predator Chimera'] and local ['Parasitic Death-Grafts']

adaptive_dynamic_coupling_mandate.description: Validation checks. The prompt cannot execute successfully unless these three physical couplings are physically forged into the generated [h_BPMS].

friction_matrix_structure.validation: Must define how the new structure limits its own movement via physical drag.

kinetic_thermodynamic_guillotine.validation: Must define the exact Joule burn-rate and starvation vector for the new structure.

resonant_constellation_map.validation: Must permanently warp the gravitational substrate upon insertion.

specific_praxial_key_integration.weld_point: Ensures generated payload inherently possesses thermodynamic mass arbitration and physical consequence.

necro_metric_telemetry.structural_shear_tolerance: If prompt parameters conflict geographically (e.g., placing a high-mass object on brittle stratification), the forge shatters the prompt before execution.
